title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: Lead development of scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and cloud-native services.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in full stack development
Strong knowledge of modern web frameworks and REST APIs
Experience with database design and performance tuning
Comfortable working with distributed teams across India

title: Mobile Application Developer
description: Build and maintain cross-platform and native mobile applications for enterprise and consumer use cases.
requirements: 3+ years of mobile development experience
Proficiency in cross-platform or native mobile development
Understanding of app store deployment processes
Strong attention to UI performance and accessibility

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive interfaces, design systems, and user flows for web and mobile software products.
requirements: 4+ years of product design experience
Portfolio demonstrating B2B and enterprise work
Proficiency in modern design and prototyping tools
Ability to collaborate closely with engineering teams

title: QA Engineer
description: Design test plans, automate regression suites, and ensure release quality across multiple projects.
requirements: 3+ years in manual and automated testing
Experience with modern browser and API testing tools
Strong understanding of SDLC and defect lifecycle
Detail-oriented with clear communication skills

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Implement CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and observability for client delivery environments.
requirements: 4+ years of DevOps or platform engineering experience
Hands-on with containers, orchestration, and cloud providers
Experience building secure deployment workflows
Familiarity with monitoring and incident response

title: Business Analyst
description: Translate business requirements into actionable specifications and support agile delivery teams.
requirements: 3+ years as a business or systems analyst
Experience documenting functional and non-functional requirements
Strong stakeholder communication skills
Exposure to software development lifecycle in IT services

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Support feature development, bug fixes, and code reviews under senior engineering mentorship.
requirements: 1–2 years of professional or internship experience
Solid fundamentals in programming and data structures
Familiarity with version control and collaborative development
Eagerness to learn modern web and cloud technologies
